alkylation reagent: adding 2 µL of iodoacetamide (400 mM in distilled water)
alkylation concentration: adding 2 µL of iodoacetamide (400 mM in distilled water)
cleavage agent: protein digestion was performed overnight at 37 °C with 15 µL of freshly prepared trypsin
collision energy: the normalised collision energies were set to 27%
instrument: LC-ESI-MS/MS was performed on a Q-Exactive Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap Mass Spectrometer
reduction reagent: 2 µl of dithiothreitol (DTT; 50 mM in liquid chromatography–mass spectrometry (LC-MS) grade water)
reduction concentration: DTT; 50 mM in liquid chromatography–mass spectrometry (LC-MS) grade water
